description.de: ZDFmediathek (auch ZDF Mediathek) ist das Video-on-Demand-Angebot des Zweiten Deutschen Fernsehens. Es startete 2001 im Zuge der IFA in Berlin und wurde – wieder zu deren Anlass – zum 1. September 2007 überarbeitet. Ein weiterer Relaunch erfolgte am 28. Oktober 2016.
description.en: ZDFmediathek is a shared video-on-demand streaming service offered by German public-sector broadcasters of ZDF.

settings.title: Privacy Mode
settings.description: Hide what you are watching and only show that you are browsing ZDFmediathek.

settings.title: Hide on Pause
settings.description: Clear the activity while the video is paused.

settings.title: Show Cover Image
settings.description: Display the show's cover as the large image instead of the ZDF logo.

settings.title: Show Channel Logo as Small Icon
settings.description: Use the broadcaster's logo (ZDF, 3sat, ZDFneo, …) as the small icon while playing. When disabled, the classic play/pause icon is shown instead.

settings.title: Show Timestamps
settings.description: Show the elapsed and remaining time of the video.

settings.title: Show Buttons
settings.description: Display interactive buttons in the Discord activity.

settings.title: State (bottom line)
settings.placeholder: Same as top line, or use {0} to remove the row completely
